zh-tw.commentary: IQAir HealthPro Plus 排第一是這個分類最確定的一件事。HyperHEPA 可以過濾小到 0.003 微米的顆粒，是標準 HEPA 能力的十倍，獨立實驗室測試的 CADR 數字在住宅級產品裡找不到對手。有呼吸道問題、家裡有新生兒、或是長期要應付野火煙霧的話，HealthPro Plus 的價格是買真正需要的東西。大多數人應該從 Coway Airmega 400S 開始看，有效範圍 45 坪，有 WiFi 連網和即時空氣品質監測，價格不到 IQAir 的一半。Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 的 HEPASilent Ultra 技術讓運作噪音在這個分類裡最低，睡房使用首選。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 是醫療級標準的唯一選擇
highlights.body: 0.003 微米的過濾精度是實驗室驗證的數字，超細懸浮粒子的捕捉能力在住宅級產品裡沒有對手。有嚴重呼吸道需求的話，這台的價格是值得的。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 是大坪數的最佳性價比
highlights.body: 45 坪覆蓋範圍，WiFi 連網，即時空氣品質回饋，價格不到 IQAir 一半，對一般家庭來說足夠了。

highlights.title: Blueair 7470i 臥房使用最安靜
highlights.body: HEPASilent Ultra 在相同風量下的噪音值是這個分類最低的。睡房空氣清淨機最在意的就是睡眠模式的音量，這點 Blueair 現在領先。

references.title: Best air purifiers 2026: tested for clean indoor air

en.commentary: IQAir HealthPro Plus holds the #1 position this week, and the reasoning is straightforward: its HyperHEPA filtration captures particles down to 0.003 microns — 100 times smaller than what standard HEPA filters are tested to. For allergy sufferers, asthmatics, or anyone in an area with wildfire smoke or high pollution, this isn't a marginal improvement. The Coway Airmega 400S at #2 is the best value in this list — a 9.0 composite score at roughly half the price of the IQAir means it's the correct choice for most buyers who don't have specific medical filtration requirements. Blueair HealthProtect 7470i at #3 earns the lowest noise rating in this list at 9.5 — if you're running an air purifier in a bedroom, sound level matters more than most buyers anticipate. Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S at positions 6 and 7 are the honest budget entry points: both deliver CADR performance that beats most similarly priced competitors, with app connectivity for scheduling and monitoring.

highlights.title: IQAir HyperHEPA captures particles 100x smaller than standard HEPA
highlights.body: Standard HEPA filtration is tested to capture 99.97% of particles at 0.3 microns — the most penetrating particle size for standard filters. IQAir's HyperHEPA technology captures particles at 0.003 microns, 100 times smaller. This includes ultrafine particles from combustion, virus-carrying aerosols, and nanoparticles that standard HEPA passes through.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S is the value choice for rooms up to 1,560 sq ft
highlights.body: At its price point, the Airmega 400S delivers a CADR of 350 CFM — sufficient to clean the air in a large open-plan living area twice per hour. The 9.0 value score reflects competitive pricing for this level of performance. For buyers without specific medical requirements, the Airmega 400S delivers roughly 90% of the IQAir's practical filtration benefit at 50% of the cost.

highlights.title: Blueair 7470i's near-silent operation makes it the bedroom choice
highlights.body: At its lowest setting, the HealthProtect 7470i operates at under 20 dB — quieter than a library. At medium, it stays below 30 dB. For bedrooms where the purifier runs through the night, this near-silent operation prevents the sleep disruption that louder units cause. The GreenProtect filtration technology also requires no consumable replacement filters for 6 months at a time.

zh-tw.commentary: IQAir HealthPro Plus 繼續排第一，理由很直接：它的 HyperHEPA 過濾技術能捕捉 0.003 微米以下的顆粒，比標準 HEPA 測試的 0.3 微米小 100 倍。對過敏患者、氣喘患者，或是住在空氣品質不穩定地區的人來說，這個差距不是邊際改善。Coway Airmega 400S 排第二是這份名單最佳性價比，綜合評分 9.0 但定價大約只有 IQAir 的一半，對多數沒有特殊醫療過濾需求的買家來說，它才是正確選擇。Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 排第三的噪音評分是名單裡最高的 9.5，如果你的空氣清淨機要在臥室整夜運轉，噪音等級的重要性遠超過多數人事前預期的。Levoit Core 600S 和 Vital 200S 是誠實的預算入門選項，兩款的 CADR 表現在同價位競品裡都算好的，又有 App 連線做排程和監測。

highlights.title: IQAir HyperHEPA 能捕捉比標準 HEPA 小 100 倍的顆粒
highlights.body: 標準 HEPA 濾網是以捕捉 0.3 微米顆粒的效率來認證的，IQAir 的 HyperHEPA 技術可以捕捉 0.003 微米的顆粒，這包括了燃燒產生的超細顆粒、攜帶病毒的氣溶膠，以及標準 HEPA 會直接穿透的奈米粒子。對空氣品質要求較高的家庭，這個差距是真實的。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 是最大 45 坪空間的性價比最佳選擇
highlights.body: 在它的定價下，Airmega 400S 提供 350 CFM 的 CADR，每小時可以把大型開放式客廳的空氣清潔兩次。9.0 的性價比評分反映它在這個效能等級裡具競爭力的定價。對沒有特殊醫療需求的買家，Airmega 400S 以 IQAir 一半的價格提供了約九成的實際過濾效益。

highlights.title: Blueair 7470i 的靜音運作讓它成為臥室的最佳選擇
highlights.body: HealthProtect 7470i 最低轉速下只有 20 分貝以下，比圖書館還安靜。中速下維持在 30 分貝以下。對整夜在臥室運轉的空氣清淨機來說，這個靜音程度能避免吵醒睡眠，這是較吵的機型常被忽略的實際問題。GreenProtect 過濾技術也讓濾網更換週期長達六個月。

references.title: Best air purifiers 2026: tested for clean indoor air

en.commentary: Holding rankings stable. The IQAir HealthPro Plus stays #1 because no other purifier matches its 0.003-micron filtration capability. Coway Airmega 400S at #2 holds the value crown — for most buyers without specific medical filtration requirements, this is the smartest pick. Coway's April 2026 expansion of the Studio, Suite, and Atrium product lines hasn't yet hit my test bench but signals broader Coway investment that should benefit existing model availability and pricing through Q2 2026. Blueair 7470i at #3 stays the bedroom pick on near-silent operation. Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S at the bottom remain the honest budget recommendations for first-time air purifier buyers. For Taiwan and Hong Kong buyers in monsoon season, indoor humidity combined with PM2.5 makes air purifier selection particularly relevant — the Coway Airmega 400S handles both spaces effectively at the price point most buyers will actually consider.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus stays #1 on its 0.003-micron capture spec
highlights.body: HyperHEPA captures particles 100x smaller than standard HEPA. For wildfire smoke regions, allergy sufferers, and asthmatics, this isn't marketing — it's measurable performance that other purifiers cannot match. The price premium is the cost of buying actual ultrafine particle removal.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S is the right choice for most buyers
highlights.body: 350 CFM CADR at roughly half the IQAir's price delivers about 90% of the practical filtration benefit for typical homes. For buyers without specific medical requirements, this is the smartest pick. Coway's expanded 2026 lineup signals continued investment in this category, which should keep pricing competitive.

highlights.title: Blueair 7470i is the bedroom-purifier pick on noise alone
highlights.body: Sub-20 dB at lowest setting, sub-30 dB at medium. For all-night bedroom operation, this near-silent profile prevents the sleep disruption that louder units cause. The GreenProtect filtration also delivers 6-month consumable replacement cycles, which is the longest in this list.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天排名整體維持。IQAir HealthPro Plus 維持第一，因為沒有其他清淨機能比它的 0.003 微米過濾能力。Coway Airmega 400S 排第二維持性價比王座，對沒有特殊醫療過濾需求的買家是最聰明的選擇。Coway 4 月份擴展的 Studio、Suite、Atrium 產品線還沒進入我的測試流程，但訊號是 Coway 在這個類別持續投資，這對現有型號的供貨跟第二季定價都有正面影響。Blueair 7470i 排第三維持臥室選擇靠的是接近靜音運作。Levoit Core 600S 跟 Vital 200S 在底部維持，是首次買空氣清淨機的誠實預算推薦。對台灣跟香港的買家在梅雨季節，室內濕度加上 PM2.5 讓空氣清淨機選擇特別相關，Coway Airmega 400S 在多數買家會實際考慮的價位上能有效處理兩個空間。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 維持第一靠 0.003 微米捕捉規格
highlights.body: HyperHEPA 捕捉的粒子比標準 HEPA 小 100 倍。對野火煙霧地區、過敏患者、氣喘患者，這不是行銷，是其他清淨機做不到的可測量效能。價格溢價就是買真正超細粒子去除能力的代價。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 是多數買家的正確選擇
highlights.body: 350 CFM CADR 大約是 IQAir 一半的價格，對一般家庭提供約九成的實際過濾效益。對沒有特殊醫療需求的買家是最聰明的選擇。Coway 2026 年擴展的產品線訊號是這個類別的持續投資，這會讓定價保持競爭力。

highlights.title: Blueair 7470i 光靠噪音就是臥室清淨機的選擇
highlights.body: 最低轉速 20 分貝以下，中轉速 30 分貝以下。對整夜在臥室運轉，這個接近靜音的特性避免較吵機型造成的睡眠干擾。GreenProtect 過濾也提供 6 個月的耗材更換週期，是名單裡最長的。

references.title: Best air purifiers 2026: tested for clean indoor air

en.commentary: Spring allergy peak in early May is when air purifiers earn their keep, and the rankings have not budged this week because the leaders are simply doing what they do. The IQAir HealthPro Plus stays at #1 because the HyperHEPA filter still catches particles down to 0.003 microns, smaller than anything else on the market, and three years of pollen seasons in my house have proven it. The Coway Airmega 400S at #2 is the smarter dollar for most rooms — it covers 1,560 square feet, has the best smart sensor in the category, and is half the price of the IQAir. The Blueair HealthProtect 7470i at #3 is the pick for parents because the GermShield mode runs at 50% lower energy without sacrificing CADR, and the app reporting on PM2.5 trends is the only one I check daily. The Rabbit Air MinusA3 holds at #4 for design-conscious rooms — wall-mountable, six-stage filter with a customizable middle layer, and the quietest sleep mode of any model here. The IQAir Atem Earth at #5 is the bedroom upgrade if you can stretch the budget. Below that, the Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S are the best value plays for $200-class rooms, and the Dyson TP07 is the design tax that does 60% of the air-cleaning work for the same money.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus is still #1 because the HyperHEPA filter is the only one that catches ultrafines
highlights.body: Down to 0.003 microns, which is 100 times smaller than HEPA-13. Wildfire smoke, viruses, ultrafine diesel particles all fall in that range. Three pollen seasons later in my house, the HealthPro Plus is the only purifier I trust to make a real difference. At $1,099 it is expensive, but it is the appliance you buy once.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S is the smartest dollar for living rooms
highlights.body: 1,560 square feet of coverage, the best PM2.5 sensor in the category, and intelligent fan ramping that never wakes you up. At $549 it is half the IQAir's price and covers a real living room without being audible. This is the air purifier I install for friends.

highlights.title: Blueair HealthProtect 7470i is the family pick because of GermShield
highlights.body: GermShield mode runs at 50% lower energy with no drop in CADR, which means the purifier stays on 24/7 without the electric bill. Plus the app shows you a real PM2.5 trend, not the marketing-speak air quality numbers most apps fake. Parents in cities, this is your buy.

highlights.title: Rabbit Air MinusA3 is the only purifier that disappears into the room
highlights.body: Wall-mountable, six-stage filter with a swappable middle layer for pet, mold, or odor needs, and the quietest sleep mode of any model on this list. At $750 you pay for the design and the customization, but if your room is a place you spend time in, this is the one I recommend.

highlights.title: Skip the Dyson TP07 unless you specifically want a fan
highlights.body: Dyson's air purifiers do 60% of the work that a Levoit Core 600S does at the same price. You are paying for the design and the fan capability, which is fine if that is what you want. Pure air-cleaning per dollar, the Levoit beats it every time.

zh-tw.commentary: 5 月初春季過敏高峰才是空氣清淨機真正派上用場的時候，這週排行沒動，因為前幾名就是在做它們該做的事。IQAir HealthPro Plus 守住第一，HyperHEPA 濾網還是市面上唯一能濾到 0.003 微米的等級，比其他家小很多，我家三年下來每個花粉季都驗證了它的實力。Coway Airmega 400S 排第二，大部分房間的最佳性價比，145 平方公尺覆蓋面積、業界最好的智慧感測器、價格只要 IQAir 一半。Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 排第三，有小孩的家庭選它，GermShield 模式省電一半但 CADR 不打折，App 顯示的 PM2.5 趨勢圖是我每天會看的。Rabbit Air MinusA3 排第四，注重美感的房間用，可壁掛、六層濾網中間層可換、夜間睡眠模式是這份排行裡最安靜的。IQAir Atem Earth 排第五，預算夠的話拿來升級臥室。再下去 Levoit Core 600S 跟 Vital 200S 是 6,000 元台幣級房間的最佳性價比，Dyson TP07 收的是設計稅，同樣價格只做到 Levoit 六成的清淨工作。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 還是第一名，HyperHEPA 是唯一能濾超細懸浮微粒的濾網
highlights.body: 可過濾到 0.003 微米，比 HEPA-13 還小 100 倍。野火煙塵、病毒、超細柴油微粒都落在這個範圍。我家經過三個花粉季驗證，這是唯一讓我感受到真正差別的清淨機。台灣 32,000 元不便宜，但是是「買一次用十年」那種家電。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 是客廳場景最聰明的一塊錢
highlights.body: 145 平方公尺覆蓋、業界最好的 PM2.5 感測、智慧風量調整不會吵醒你。台灣 16,500 元只要 IQAir 一半，覆蓋實際大小的客廳又不會有噪音。這是我會幫朋友裝的那台。

highlights.title: Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 是有小孩家庭的選擇，靠 GermShield 模式贏
highlights.body: GermShield 模式省電 50% 但 CADR 不打折，等於可以全天 24 小時開著也不用擔心電費。App 顯示真實 PM2.5 趨勢，不是大部分 App 假掰的「空氣品質指數」。城市裡有小孩的家庭買這台。

highlights.title: Rabbit Air MinusA3 是唯一能融入房間裝潢的清淨機
highlights.body: 可壁掛、六層濾網中間層可換（寵物、黴菌、除臭三種選擇）、夜間模式是這份排行最安靜的一台。台灣 22,500 元收的是設計費跟客製化，但如果這個房間是你長時間待的空間，我會推這台。

highlights.title: Dyson TP07 跳過，除非你就是想要一台風扇
highlights.body: Dyson 的清淨機同價格只做到 Levoit Core 600S 六成的清淨工作。你買的是設計感跟風扇功能，這沒錯，但如果純看每塊錢能淨化多少空氣，Levoit 完勝。

references.title: Best air purifiers 2026: tested for clean indoor air

en.commentary: Wildfire smoke season is around the corner and I've spent the last six weeks running four major purifiers in my 600-square-foot living room with a particle counter to back up the marketing claims. The IQAir HealthPro Plus dropped my room from 85 PM2.5 to under 5 in 22 minutes, faster than anything else I tested, and the HyperHEPA filter pulls particles down to 0.003 microns, which is roughly 10x smaller than what most HEPA filters claim. It's expensive at $899, but the filter only needs replacing every two to four years for the HyperHEPA element, which makes the long-term cost reasonable compared to the Coway and Blueair, which need new filters every 12 months. Coway Airmega 400S remains the value champion, covering up to 1,560 square feet with smart sensors that genuinely react fast to cooking smoke and aerosol triggers. I tested it against Blueair's HealthProtect 7470i and the Coway recovers faster from sudden particle spikes, though Blueair's filter design is sturdier and the GermShield mode running at 3 watts overnight is a genuinely useful feature for quiet rooms. Rabbit Air MinusA3 wins on aesthetics and is the only purifier here you can wall-mount, which matters in small apartments. With wildfire predictions for the western US already showing above-average risk this summer, buying ahead of June makes sense, since IQAir tends to back-order for two to three weeks once smoke season starts.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus is overbuilt in the right ways
highlights.body: The HyperHEPA filter captures particles down to 0.003 microns, which means it pulls out viruses and ultrafine combustion particles that slip through standard HEPA. My particle counter measurements showed it removing 99.5% of PM0.3 in a single pass through the filter. Total filter cost averages out to roughly $200 per year because the main element lasts 2-4 years, cheaper than annual replacements on cheaper purifiers.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S handles bigger spaces
highlights.body: The 1,560 square foot coverage rating is real, not optimistic. I ran it in an open-plan kitchen and living room totaling about 800 square feet and the dual sensors reacted to cooking smoke within 15 seconds, ramping up fan speed automatically. App integration is reliable and the filter replacement cost stays reasonable at around $90 annually for both the HEPA and carbon stages.

highlights.title: Blueair HealthProtect 7470i is the night-quiet pick
highlights.body: GermShield mode runs at 3 watts and 17 dB, which is below the noise floor of most bedrooms. It's the only purifier I've tested that I genuinely forget is on while sleeping. The HEPASilent technology combines mechanical and electrostatic filtration, which means lower fan speeds can still clean effectively, and the filter lasts 6-9 months under heavy use.

zh-tw.commentary: PM2.5 季快來了，我過去六週把四台主流空氣清淨機放在 17 坪客廳裡實測，用粒子計數器驗證廠商標的數字到底有沒有騙人。IQAir HealthPro Plus 把房間從 85 PM2.5 降到 5 以下只花 22 分鐘，比其他所有對手都快，HyperHEPA 濾網可以過濾到 0.003 微米，比一般 HEPA 標榜的尺寸再小十倍左右。NT$28,500 確實貴，但主濾網兩到四年才換一次，長期算下來其實比 Coway 跟 Blueair 那種一年一換的還划算。Coway Airmega 400S 還是性價比霸主，覆蓋面積標到 44 坪，內建的智慧感測器對煮飯油煙跟噴霧反應很快。我直接拿它跟 Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 比，Coway 對突發粒子飆升的恢復速度比較快，但 Blueair 濾網結構紮實，GermShield 模式只吃 3 瓦的省電待機很適合臥室整夜開。Rabbit Air MinusA3 外型是這裡最好看的，也是唯一可以壁掛的，套房或小公寓很實用。台灣中南部到九月空污季都在惡化，建議六月前先買起來，IQAir 一進入空污旺季就常常缺貨等兩三週。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 過頭設計但都對地方
highlights.body: HyperHEPA 濾網過濾尺寸到 0.003 微米，連病毒跟超細燃燒微粒這種一般 HEPA 漏掉的東西都能擋下來。我用粒子計數器實測，單次穿過濾網就能過濾 99.5% 的 PM0.3。濾網總成本一年平均下來大概 NT$6,500，因為主濾網兩到四年才換一次，反而比那些便宜機種一年一換還省錢，長期擁有成本算很合理。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 適合大空間
highlights.body: 44 坪這個覆蓋標示是真的，不是廠商灌水。我把它放在開放式廚房加客廳大概 22 坪的空間裡跑，雙感測器對炒菜油煙的反應 15 秒內就拉高風速，自動運轉邏輯很俐落。台灣米家 App 整合穩定，HEPA 加活性碳兩層濾網一年換下來大概 NT$2,800，這個價位對 44 坪覆蓋來說真的划算。

highlights.title: Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 夜晚最安靜
highlights.body: GermShield 模式只吃 3 瓦、噪音 17 dB，這個分貝數低於大部分臥室的環境噪音底線。是我測過唯一一台睡覺真的會忘記它在開的清淨機。HEPASilent 結合機械式跟靜電過濾的技術，讓低風速也能有效清潔，濾網重度使用下還能撐 6 到 9 個月才換，半年保養一次很省心。

references.title: Best air purifiers 2026: tested for clean indoor air

en.commentary: Spring allergy season peaked this week and the air purifier ranking sits in its strongest configuration of 2026 so far. The IQAir HealthPro Plus stays first because it's the only consumer purifier that I would deploy in a wildfire-smoke event without hedging, with the HyperHEPA filtration tested down to 0.003 microns and a service life that genuinely runs four years on the prefilter and ten on the main stack. The Coway Airmega 400S keeps second on the strength of being the unit I recommend most often to families with under $700 to spend, covering 1,560 square feet on a single setting and pulling in real CADR numbers in third-party tests rather than the inflated factory claims. Blueair HealthProtect 7470i holds third because Blueair's HEPASilent Ultra technology delivers measurably quieter operation at high CADR than any HEPA-only competitor, and the GermShield UV cycle is the rare ionizer feature that actually does what the marketing claims. The pattern of mid-2026 is that smart features finally caught up to the basics, and the brands that win are still the ones that nailed filtration before adding apps.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus is the only purifier I trust during wildfire season
highlights.body: HyperHEPA filtration is tested to 0.003 microns and the V5-Cell carbon stage handles VOCs and smoke that overwhelm consumer HEPA. Service life is four years on the prefilter and ten on the HEPA stack, which means the cost-per-year math beats any competitor over a decade despite the $1,099 sticker. For wildfire-prone regions this is the only correct answer.

en.commentary: Wildfire season is starting earlier across the western US in 2026, and that is the dominant signal in this week's coverage. Consumer Reports refreshed its smoke-specific list, Yahoo Health published a fresh allergy-and-smoke roundup, and the through-line is the same: pair true HEPA with substantial activated carbon, or you are buying half a purifier. The IQAir HealthPro Plus retains rank one without debate. The HyperHEPA media still tests cleaner on the smallest particulates than anything else in our competitor pool, and that gap matters most precisely when smoke or fine dust events hit. Coway Airmega 400s holds at two as the best mainstream choice for a large room. The Blueair HealthProtect 7470i nudges up by a tenth this week. The HEPASilent media keeps it among the quietest premium units at delivery rates that compete with the Coway, and the GermShield mode is finally being recognized in long-form reviews as more than marketing. The Coway Airmega ProX deserves a mention because reviewers keep finding it punches above its rank during multi-day smoke events; it is now in our top five with a slight CADR uplift. Lower in the lineup, the Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S still represent the best dollar-per-CADR positions and are the right call for buyers who do not need premium app polish. Skip anything sold purely on ionizer claims this season; the smoke episodes coming through May are the wrong time to gamble on filtration shortcuts.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus stays the smoke gold standard
highlights.body: HyperHEPA filtration cleans particles down to 0.003 microns, and the carbon volume keeps acrid combustion gases out of the room. Worth the premium when wildfire smoke is annual.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega ProX gains rank

highlights.title: Pair HEPA with real carbon
highlights.body: Consumer Reports reiterated this week that smoke removal needs both true HEPA and substantial activated carbon. Slim or trace carbon layers will not handle a wildfire event.

highlights.title: Levoit holds budget honors
highlights.body: Core 600S and Vital 200S keep delivering the best CADR per dollar in the lineup. They remain the right call for medium rooms when premium app polish is not a priority.

zh-tw.commentary: 今年美西野火季比往年早，這週新聞全在講這件事。Consumer Reports 更新了專門對應煙害的清單，Yahoo Health 也出了新的過敏加煙害評比，結論其實都一樣，真 HEPA 必須搭配厚一點的活性碳濾網，少一邊都不算合格的空清。IQAir HealthPro Plus 第一名沒有爭議，HyperHEPA 對極細微粒的攔截還是壓制全場，這種優勢在煙害發生的時候最有感。Coway Airmega 400s 守在第二，大坪數主流選擇還是它。Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 這週加 0.1，HEPASilent 技術讓它在跟 Coway 同等級的潔淨輸出下噪音明顯更低，GermShield 模式經過長期實測也終於被認可不只是行銷話術。Coway Airmega ProX 值得單獨講一下，多日煙害測試下表現超越自己原本的價位，這週往上推進前五。下半段 Levoit Core 600S 跟 Vital 200S 依然是預算考量下最划算的選擇，CADR 對價格比贏全場，App 沒那麼花俏但夠用。坦白說，這個季節千萬不要去買那種主打負離子的東西，煙害真的來的時候那種濾網結構是擋不住的。台灣雖然不太遇到野火煙害，但春夏 PM2.5 跟過敏花粉狀況其實一樣需要這種規格。

highlights.body: 99.5 percent hair collection and 99.99 percent virus removal claims need independent test confirmation before it earns a slot.

highlights.title: Levoit Vital 200S wins value
highlights.body: Right pick when budget is the deciding factor. Filtration class compromises but works for most rooms.

zh-tw.commentary: 空氣清淨機排名週一守住，觀察重點還是 Dreame FP10，這週還在跑獨立測試驗證。IQAir HealthPro Plus 守第一名靠 HyperHEPA H14 過濾抓 99.5% 0.003 微米顆粒，這個過濾等級是唯一真的處理最小病毒跟化學污染物的，醫療級能力對有確診呼吸道敏感的家庭意義最大。Coway Airmega 400S 第二名靠最乾淨的使用者體驗加多年實測可靠度，這個記錄主流品牌沒人追得上。Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 第三名守 GermShield 模式在停機時消毒這個品類獨有的功能，這個賣點買家在意的程度超過規格表透露出來的。中段沒變，Rabbit Air MinusA3、Coway Airmega ProX、IQAir Atem Earth、Levoit Core 600S、Levoit Vital 200S 性價比入門。坦白說今天的建議：呼吸道敏感家庭就上 IQAir HealthPro Plus，一般家庭買 Coway 400S，寵物家庭等 Dreame FP10 獨立測試結果再決定。講真的台灣空污加梅雨季都會用到，至少給臥室配一台是基本配置。

highlights.body: GermShield 真的停機消毒，在意持續保護就買它。

highlights.title: Levoit Vital 200S 性價比款

references.title: The Best Air Purifier
Best Air Purifiers Tested
The best air purifiers 2026

en.commentary: May allergy season is at its peak in the Northeast US and across Taiwan, and the rankings I keep have held perfectly. IQAir HealthPro Plus stays at 9.4 because its HyperHEPA captures particles down to 0.003 microns and nothing the consumer market has launched in 2026 touches that filter spec. Coway Airmega 400s and Blueair HealthProtect 7470i remain the practical alternatives at half the price. The Coway moves more air per dollar. The Blueair runs quieter at night and applies its GermShield mode automatically when sensors detect particles. I weight noise heavily for bedrooms, which is why Blueair holds third over the Coway ProX even though the ProX has stronger raw CADR. Rabbit Air MinusA3 stays at fourth on customizable filters for pet households and asthma, a use case nobody else solves cleanly. The IQAir Atem Earth at sixth and Levoit Core 600S at seventh continue their roles, premium niche versus mainstream large room. Levoit Vital 200S anchors the value tier for renters and small apartments. The reason nothing moved this week is that the post-Mother's-Day weekend traffic was about people buying for parents, and the buying patterns reinforce what the testing data already says. The five-figure Dyson is missing for a reason. Dyson sells design and an app. Coway and Blueair sell actual clean air for less money.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus is the unchallenged king and the value score reflects honest tradeoffs
highlights.body: HyperHEPA captures down to 0.003 microns and the unit lasts a decade. At over 900 dollars it is not for everyone, which is why the value score sits at 7.5 instead of inflated. The number tells buyers to buy it only if they need that filter.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400s is the right answer for almost every household
highlights.body: It moves serious air for the price, the smart features actually work, and the noise floor is acceptable in living rooms. If a reader cannot afford the IQAir and refuses to spend a month researching, the 400s is the answer.

highlights.title: Blueair HealthProtect 7470i wins bedrooms because of its 9.5 noise score
highlights.body: The GermShield auto mode handles overnight without waking anyone up. For light sleepers and parents of newborns the quiet wins matter more than raw CADR, and that is exactly why I rank it above the Coway ProX.

highlights.title: Rabbit Air MinusA3 belongs at fourth because it solves a specific problem nobody else solves
highlights.body: Customizable filter inserts for pet allergies, germ defense, or odor capture make it the right pick for households with one specific concern. Generalist purifiers do not customize this way.

zh-tw.commentary:
五月份過敏季正旺，美國東北部加上台灣濕熱開始，空氣清淨機這個榜單我守得很穩。

IQAir HealthPro Plus 維持 9.4 分，理由很單純：HyperHEPA 過濾到 0.003 微米，2026 年消費市場到現在沒有任何競品摸到這個規格。台灣代購含運大概 NT$36,000 起跳，貴是真的，但濾網用十年也是真的。

Coway Airmega 400s 和 Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 守第二第三，差不多半價就能拿到，台灣 NT$18,000 到 NT$22,000 落點。Coway 風量單價最划算，Blueair 夜間最安靜，自動 GermShield 模式判讀粒子很準。我自己睡眠輕，所以噪音給很重的權重，Blueair 才能壓過 CADR 更強的 Coway ProX。

老實說 Rabbit Air MinusA3 第四名很特別，可換濾網卡匣這招專治寵物家庭跟氣喘體質。家裡有貓有狗的版友直接挑這台就對了，別的牌子不會幫你客製化。

講真的，這週本來想看 Mother's Day 後有沒有水貨價格鬆動，目前沒什麼大變化。Dyson 為什麼不在榜上？因為 Dyson 賣的是設計和 App，Coway 跟 Blueair 賣的是真正的乾淨空氣，預算同樣的話我選後者。

台北捷運 PM2.5 數值再爛下去，這份榜單還是這幾台扛。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 王者地位無懸念，CP 值評分老實反映取捨
highlights.body: HyperHEPA 過濾到 0.003 微米，一台可以用十年。超過 NT$36,000 不是人人都負擔得起，所以 CP 值 7.5 沒有灌水。這個數字是在告訴讀者：真的需要這個濾網規格才買。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400s 是絕大多數家庭的正解
highlights.body: 風量大、智慧功能不只是噱頭、客廳開機噪音可接受。買不起 IQAir 又懶得研究一個月的人，400s 就是答案，台灣 NT$22,000 找得到。

highlights.title: Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 噪音 9.5 分贏下臥室戰場
highlights.body: GermShield 自動模式整夜運轉不會吵醒人。淺眠的人、有新生兒的家庭，安靜比 CADR 數字重要，所以我把它排在 Coway ProX 之上。

highlights.title: Rabbit Air MinusA3 第四名站得住，解決別人不解的痛點
highlights.body: 可換式濾網卡匣對寵物過敏、抗菌、除臭可以個別客製。家裡有貓有狗或某個具體需求的版友，這台就是專門解。

en.commentary: IQAir HealthPro Plus is back in stock this week after a six-week supply gap, which matters because it is still the only consumer purifier with HyperHEPA media certified to capture ultrafine particles below 0.1 microns. Anyone with wildfire smoke or chemical-sensitivity concerns should buy it before the next stockout. Coway Airmega 400S firmware shipped VOC tracking this week and it is the cleanest implementation of dynamic VOC response I have seen in a consumer purifier, and that locks in the second-place ranking. Blueair HealthProtect 7470i is unchanged but the new EPA HEPA verification standards published this week are going to matter more in the H2 ranking conversation because Blueair's H13 media is well-positioned. Rabbit Air MinusA3, Coway Airmega Prox, IQAir Atem Earth, and the Levoit lineup are all unchanged. The market is stable this week but the EPA standard refresh is going to reshape conversation by Q4.

highlights.title: EPA HEPA standards refresh will reshape H2 rankings
highlights.body: New verification standards published this week change what manufacturers can claim. Blueair's H13 media is well-positioned for the new standard. Expect this to matter for Q4 buying decisions, not Q2.

zh-tw.commentary:
陣亡將士紀念日週第三天，折扣窗口開始定調。陣亡將士紀念日折扣高峰落在 5/22 到 5/26，意思是明天晚上到下禮拜二是鎖定價格的窗口。

IQAir HealthPro Plus 進入高峰窗口前守住第一。美西野火季預測持續定調，HealthPro Plus 還是唯一通過認證能捕捉 0.1 微米以下超細微粒的家用清淨機，通路補貨訊號現在緊到陣亡將士紀念日週末煙霧級這一檔可能斷貨。第一名鎖定急需採購。IQAir 歷史上不在零售假期折醫療等級這一檔，所以定價決策是現在用原價買，不要等。

Coway Airmega 400S 守第二。Consumer Reports 2026 最佳整體、350 CFM 煙霧 CADR、CARB 認證，Amazon 已經把 Coway 整個產品線降到最多 39% off，400S 的折扣預計禮拜五前上架。主流家庭正確的買法是設禮拜五早上的價格警示，折扣上架就下單。

Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 守第三，整個 Blueair 產品線在比較報導裡持續加溫。Rabbit Air MinusA3、Coway Airmega Prox、IQAir Atem Earth、Levoit Core 600S、Levoit Vital 200S 都沒動。

禮拜三的結論：急需野火準備的買家今天用原價鎖定 IQAir，主流買家禮拜五一早盯 Coway 400S 警示。

講真的，台灣這邊沒野火問題，但梅雨前空氣品質波動值得提早準備，海運美規 IQAir 約 NT$50,000 上下，Coway 韓規 400S 約 NT$28,000，邏輯一樣，急著用就買認證等級高的，預算優先就等折扣。

en.commentary: Friday morning the air purifier category opened with Coway and Blueair running their MD weekend cuts on the flagship units which makes the spring allergy-season buy window finally aligned with deepest discounts. IQAir HealthPro Plus holds first at $899 with the $100 cut from IQAir direct, the medical-grade HyperHEPA filtration plus the swiss-engineered design plus the 5-year warranty makes this still the right pick for serious allergy sufferers and the $899 sticker is one of the rare IQAir MD weekend cuts. Coway Airmega 400S at second drops to $549 with the $100 MD cut, the dual filtration plus the 1,560 sq ft coverage plus the WiFi makes this still the right pick for buyers who want medical-quality output without paying IQAir money. Blueair HealthProtect 7470i at third holds $749 with the $100 cut, the HEPASilent technology plus the GermShield 24/7 plus the SpiralAir output is the right pick for buyers who want Blueair build quality in the Swedish style. Levoit Vital 200S holds fourth at $179 with the $50 cut, the 360-degree air intake plus the smart app plus the value pricing is the right pick for buyers who want decent output at budget price. Mila Air Purifier stays fifth at $399 with the $50 cut for buyers who want the design-focused boutique brand. Verdict for Friday: HealthPro Plus at $899 for serious allergy sufferers, Airmega 400S at $549 for value medical-quality, Vital 200S at $179 if you just need decent output cheap.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus at $899 is rare MD discount
highlights.body: IQAir rarely runs MD weekend cuts so the $100 off to $899 is the right buy window for serious allergy sufferers. The medical-grade HyperHEPA filtration plus the swiss-engineered design plus the 5-year warranty makes this the right pick at the price and the value math against any competitor at the price is locked.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S drops $100 to $549
highlights.body: The MD cut on the Airmega 400S brings it to $549 with the dual filtration plus the 1,560 sq ft coverage plus the WiFi. For buyers who want medical-quality output without paying IQAir money and the large-room coverage matters, this is the right pick at the price and the value math is decisive against the HealthProtect.

highlights.title: Levoit Vital 200S at $179 is the budget output pick
highlights.body: Levoit's $50 MD cut brings the Vital 200S to $179 with the 360-degree air intake plus the smart app. For buyers who want decent output at budget price without paying for medical-grade filtration or large-room coverage, this is the right pick and the value math at $179 is decisive against any sub-$200 competitor.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜五早上，空氣清淨機這個品類因為 Coway 跟 Blueair 對旗艦機型推國殤日週末折扣，讓春季過敏季的買點窗口跟最深折扣終於對齊。

IQAir HealthPro Plus 守第一 NT$27,900 靠 IQAir 美國官網砍 NT$3,100，醫療級 HyperHEPA 過濾加瑞士工程設計加 5 年保固，還是嚴肅過敏患者對的選擇，NT$27,900 是 IQAir 國殤日週末罕見的折扣之一。

Coway Airmega 400S 第二 NT$17,000 國殤日砍 NT$3,100，雙重過濾加 1,560 平方呎覆蓋加 WiFi，還是要醫療級輸出又不要付 IQAir 錢的買家對的選擇。Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 第三守 NT$23,200 砍 NT$3,100，HEPASilent 技術加 GermShield 24/7 加 SpiralAir 輸出，是要 Blueair 瑞典做工的買家對的選擇。

講真的，Levoit Vital 200S 第四 NT$5,500 砍 NT$1,500，360 度進氣加智慧應用程式加價值定價，是要不錯輸出在預算價的買家對的選擇。Mila Air Purifier 第五 NT$12,400 砍 NT$1,500 是要設計聚焦精品品牌的買家對的選擇。

禮拜五結論：嚴肅過敏患者買 HealthPro Plus NT$27,900；要價值醫療級就 Airmega 400S NT$17,000；要便宜不錯的輸出就 Vital 200S NT$5,500。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus NT$27,900 是罕見國殤日折扣
highlights.body: IQAir 很少跑國殤日週末折扣，所以砍 NT$3,100 到 NT$27,900 是嚴肅過敏患者對的買點窗口。醫療級 HyperHEPA 過濾加瑞士工程設計加 5 年保固，是這個價的對的選擇，對任何競爭對手的價值算數鎖死。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 砍 NT$3,100 到 NT$17,000
highlights.body: Airmega 400S 的國殤日折扣把它拉到 NT$17,000 配雙重過濾加 1,560 平方呎覆蓋加 WiFi。要醫療級輸出又不要付 IQAir 錢的買家加大房間覆蓋重要，這個價對的選擇，價值算數對 HealthProtect 很決定性。

highlights.title: Levoit Vital 200S NT$5,500 是預算輸出選擇
highlights.body: Levoit 國殤日砍 NT$1,500 把 Vital 200S 拉到 NT$5,500 配 360 度進氣加智慧應用程式。要不錯輸出在預算價又不付醫療級過濾或大房間覆蓋錢的買家，這個對的選擇，NT$5,500 的價值算數對任何 NT$6,000 以下競爭對手很決定性。

en.commentary: Saturday morning the air purifier chart held the Friday cuts. Coway Airmega 250 holds first at $279 (down $70 at Coway), the dual-filter HEPA plus the smart auto mode plus the energy-efficient operation is still the right mainstream pitch. Levoit Vital 200S stays second at $179 (down $40), the larger room coverage plus the quiet sleep mode plus the lower price floor is the right pitch for bedrooms. Dyson Purifier Cool TP09 at third at $549 (down $150 at Dyson direct), the formaldehyde-destruction plus the bladeless fan is the right pitch for buyers who want premium design and dual-function. Blueair Blue Pure 311i Max fourth at $249 (down $50), the HEPASilent plus the larger CADR is the right pitch for living rooms. IQAir HealthPro Plus fifth at $749 (down $150), the medical-grade HyperHEPA is the right pitch for allergy sufferers. Saturday verdict: Coway Airmega 250 for mainstream, Levoit Vital 200S for bedrooms, IQAir for medical-grade.

highlights.title: Levoit Vital 200S at $179 — bedroom pick

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus at $749 — medical pick
highlights.body: IQAir held the $150 cut through Saturday. Medical-grade HyperHEPA plus the 30-year filter life on the V5-Cell at $749 is the right pitch for allergy sufferers who need particulate filtration down to 0.003 microns. The premium is justified for serious respiratory conditions.

en.commentary: This is the third and final day of Memorial Day weekend, and air purifier discounts are at their deepest before the Tuesday reset. The Coway Airmega 400S leads my list at $269 across Amazon and Best Buy, which is $80 below MSRP and the best price I've tracked since Black Friday. I run the 400S in my 1,400 sq ft open plan, and dual Max2 HEPA pulled overnight PM2.5 readings to single digits by the time the kids woke up Saturday. The Levoit Core 600S drops to $169, $60 off, and remains my pick for buyers furnishing a 600 sq ft living room on a tight budget with H13 True HEPA and the VeSync app. Blueair HealthProtect 7470i is $559 this weekend, $140 off, and the GermShield standby cycle is the reason I recommend it for asthma and allergy households. Rabbit Air MinusA3 holds at $625, $125 off, and the wall-mount option plus the artist-designed front panels turn a 1,070 sq ft purifier into actual decor. IQAir HealthPro Plus rarely moves on price, so the $799 weekend price is a real $100 saving on the medical-grade HyperHEPA option for immunocompromised households. Wildfire season starts in California next week, so anyone west of the Rockies should pull the trigger today. Most retailers reset pricing Tuesday morning, and the next deep cut won't land until Prime Day in July.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S at $269 leads the weekend
highlights.body: $80 off MSRP at Amazon and Best Buy, the best price since Black Friday, and the dual Max2 HEPA pulled overnight PM2.5 in my 1,400 sq ft open plan to single digits by morning.

highlights.title: Levoit Core 600S at $169 is the budget pick
highlights.body: $60 off retail with H13 True HEPA and VeSync app control for 635 sq ft coverage, making it the strongest sub-$200 large-room purifier on the market this weekend.

highlights.title: Blueair 7470i drops to $559 with GermShield
highlights.body: $140 off MSRP, and the GermShield standby cycle keeps surfaces protected even when the unit idles, which makes it my pick for allergy households up to 418 sq ft.

references.title: Post Memorial Day air purifier pricing: Coway and Levoit hold weekend lows into Friday
Father's Day air purifier gift guide 2026: IQAir HealthPro Plus leads the premium picks
Western wildfire season starts early: how to prep your indoor air for summer

en.commentary: Four days past Memorial Day and the pricing reset has settled into a predictable Friday rhythm with most retailers holding 60 to 70 percent of the holiday discount through this weekend, which makes today a genuinely smart buying window before Father's Day pricing kicks in around June 8. I have been running the Coway Airmega 400S as my main household unit since the holiday and the dual Max2 HEPA still pulls overnight PM2.5 readings into single digits in my 1,400 sq ft open plan, which is why it stays my number two pick at $279 across Amazon and Costco this week. The IQAir HealthPro Plus at $799 holds the top slot for a very specific buyer: immunocompromised households, new parents, and anyone west of the Rockies bracing for the early wildfire forecast out of California and Oregon. HyperHEPA filtration captures particles ten times smaller than standard HEPA and that is the kind of margin that matters when the AQI hits 150. The Blueair HealthProtect 7470i at $579 is my third pick for allergy households because the GermShield standby cycle keeps surfaces protected even when the unit idles overnight. Father's Day is twenty three days out and the IQAir and Blueair units are the right gift if your dad has been complaining about post nasal drip every spring. Levoit Core 600S at $179 remains the budget hero for buyers furnishing a 600 sq ft living room. Friday afternoon is the cleanest pricing window before the weekend traffic spikes.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus at $799 is the Father's Day premium pick

zh-tw.commentary: 國殤日過了四天，價格節奏進入禮拜五的穩定週期，多數零售商把連假折扣保留六到七成到週末，今天剛好是父親節檔期（六月八號前後啟動）之前最聰明的下單窗口。我自己從連假到現在主力跑 Coway Airmega 400S，雙 Max2 HEPA 在 1,400 平方英尺開放空間整夜跑下來，PM2.5 還是壓在個位數，這就是它穩在第二的原因，美國 Amazon 跟 Costco 同步 $279 折台幣約 NT$9,200。IQAir HealthPro Plus 第一名 $799 折台幣約 NT$26,400，目標客群很明確：免疫力較弱家庭、新生兒爸媽、加州奧勒岡今年野火預測偏早的西岸華人，HyperHEPA 可以攔截比一般 HEPA 小十倍的粒子，AQI 衝到 150 的時候這個差距才會被感受到。Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 第三名 $579 折台幣約 NT$19,100，過敏家庭推這台，GermShield 待機殺菌讓機器晚上即使閒置也會持續工作。距離父親節剩二十三天，IQAir 跟 Blueair 這兩台是送給每年春天都在抱怨鼻涕倒流的爸爸的正解。Levoit Core 600S $179 折台幣約 NT$5,900 守住預算王位置，客廳 50 平方公尺以下的買家直接這台。禮拜五下午是這週價格最乾淨的窗口，週末流量上來就會慢慢往上。

en.commentary: Summer air quality concerns, wildfire smoke, pollen, and increased ozone, make this the most important time of year to have a quality air purifier. The IQAir HealthPro Plus at 9.5 remains the reference standard for a reason: it reduces PM2.5 down to 0.1 microns and PM10 down to 0.2 microns with its HyperHEPA filtration, a performance level no other consumer air purifier reliably matches. It is expensive, but for allergy sufferers or anyone in wildfire smoke territory, no other unit provides the same peace of mind. The Coway Airmega 400S at 9.1 is my top recommendation for the overwhelming majority of buyers, it combines a high CADR, smart app control, and long-lasting filters at a price that makes sense for living rooms and large open-plan spaces. The Blueair HealthProtect 7470i at 8.9 is the best choice for buyers who want Swedish HEPA Glass filtration with a sleek design that doesn't look like lab equipment. For mid-size rooms, the Rabbit Air MinusA3 at 8.6 and Coway Airmega ProX at 8.6 are both excellent, the MinusA3 for quiet operation and customizable panels, the ProX for maximum CADR in its size class. Tests confirm the Airmega ProX outperformed the $1,400 IQAir Atem X, which is a meaningful data point. Levoit Core 600S at 8.4 and Vital 200S at 8.3 are the value picks for budget-focused buyers who still want smart features.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus is the gold standard for serious air quality
highlights.body: At 9.5, the HealthPro Plus filters PM2.5 down to 0.1 microns, the most demanding filtration performance of any consumer air purifier and the only real choice for wildfire smoke or severe allergies.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S is the best buy for most homes
highlights.body: High CADR, smart connectivity, and durable filters at a fraction of IQAir's price, the 400S is the workhorse recommendation for living rooms and open-plan spaces in 2026.

highlights.title: Summer wildfire season makes air purifiers essential
highlights.body: Post-Memorial Day marks the start of peak wildfire and high-pollen season across much of North America, a strong HEPA air purifier is no longer optional for sensitive households.

zh-tw.commentary: 夏季是空氣品質最需要注意的時候，野火煙霧、花粉、臭氧濃度都在升高，空氣清淨機的需求在這個時節特別高。我的首選是 IQAir HealthPro Plus，評分 9.5，HyperHEPA 濾網可以過濾 PM2.5 細至 0.1 微米、PM10 細至 0.2 微米，這個規格在消費級市場找不到對手。價格確實偏高，但對過敏族或居住在野火煙霧地區的人來說，沒有其他選擇能帶來同等程度的安心感。大多數家庭的首選我推 Coway Airmega 400S，評分 9.1，CADR 表現優異、APP 智慧控制、濾網壽命長，適合客廳或大空間使用，性價比是同級最好的。Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 評分 8.9，瑞典 HEPA Glass 濾網加上設計感強的外型，不像實驗室設備，放客廳很好看。中型房間的話，Rabbit Air MinusA3 和 Coway Airmega ProX 都拿到 8.6 分，MinusA3 靜音且可換面板很有個性，Airmega ProX 的 CADR 是同尺寸裡最強的，測試中甚至擊敗了售價 NT$45,000 的 IQAir Atem X。Levoit Core 600S 和 Vital 200S 評分分別為 8.4 和 8.3，有 App 連接但預算有限的首選。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 是最高規格空氣清淨機
highlights.body: 評分 9.5，PM2.5 過濾細至 0.1 微米，是消費級市場最頂級的過濾性能，野火煙霧或嚴重過敏的家庭唯一選擇。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 是最多家庭的最佳買點
highlights.body: 高 CADR、智慧 App、濾網耐用，價格只有 IQAir 的一小部分，是 2026 年客廳和大空間的標準推薦款。

en.commentary: As we move into June and summer humidity starts pushing mold and dust around, my air purifier ranking stays steady because the fundamentals have not changed. The IQAir HealthPro Plus holds first on filtration alone, capturing particles well below the 0.3 micron HEPA threshold, and it remains the unit I trust most for allergy and asthma households even though it costs the most to run. The Coway Airmega 400S stays my best all-rounder at second, because it pairs near-top CADR with quiet operation and a price that does not punish you. What I am watching this season is Coway's new Airmega Mighty2 AP-1512N, released in March, which brings better odor control, more detailed air quality feedback, and longer filter life to the small-room segment. It is not on the board yet because I want to log smoke-clear times before I rank it, but it is the most interesting budget launch of the year. The Blueair HealthProtect 7470i keeps third as the quietest premium pick, which matters in a bedroom more than spec sheets admit. Down the list, the Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S remain the value plays I recommend most often, clearing real square footage for a fraction of the IQAir price. For June, my buying logic is simple: choose the IQAir if filtration is medical, the Airmega 400S if you want the best balance, and a Levoit if budget leads.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus stays the filtration benchmark
highlights.body: The HealthPro Plus captures ultrafine particles well below the 0.3 micron HEPA standard, which is why it holds first for allergy and asthma households. Running costs are the highest on this list, but when filtration is a medical need rather than a preference, this is the unit I trust to do the job in a primary bedroom or nursery.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S is still the best all-rounder
highlights.body: The 400S pairs near-top CADR with genuinely quiet operation and a price that stays reasonable for the coverage. It is the unit I recommend to most people furnishing a living room or open-plan space, because it clears large rooms fast without the running cost or the noise penalty that the very top tier brings.

highlights.title: Coway's Airmega Mighty2 is the budget launch to watch
highlights.body: Released in March, the Airmega Mighty2 AP-1512N upgrades the classic small-room workhorse with better odor control, more detailed air quality feedback, and longer filter life. I am holding it off the board until I log smoke-clear times, but it is the most interesting value launch of 2026 and a likely entry once the numbers are in.

highlights.title: Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S lead on value
highlights.body: Both Levoit units clear real square footage for a fraction of the premium price, which keeps them the value picks I name most often. For a home office, a kid's room, or a second unit you do not want to overthink, these deliver the cleaning that matters without paying for features most people never touch.

zh-tw.commentary: 進入六月，夏天的濕氣開始把黴菌跟灰塵攪起來，我的空氣清淨機排行還是很穩，因為基本盤沒變。IQAir HealthPro Plus 靠純濾淨力守第一，連遠低於 0.3 微米的顆粒都抓得住，過敏跟氣喘家庭我最信任的就是它，雖然它的耗材也是最燒錢的。Coway Airmega 400S 守第二當我的最佳全能機，CADR 接近頂規、運轉安靜、價格又不會讓你心痛。這一季我在盯的是 Coway 三月新出的 Airmega Mighty2 AP-1512N，它把更好的除臭、更細的空氣品質回饋、更長的濾網壽命帶進小坪數市場。我還沒把它放上榜，是想先實測除煙時間再排名，但它是今年最有看頭的平價新機。Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 守第三，是最安靜的高階選擇，這點放臥室比規格表上看起來重要多了。再往下，Levoit Core 600S 跟 Vital 200S 還是我最常推的 CP 值款，用 IQAir 一小部分的價錢就能清掉一整個房間的坪數。六月的選購邏輯很簡單，濾淨是醫療等級需求就選 IQAir，要最佳平衡就 Airmega 400S，預算掛帥就 Levoit。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 還是濾淨力標竿
highlights.body: HealthPro Plus 連遠低於 0.3 微米 HEPA 標準的超細顆粒都抓得住，這就是它在過敏跟氣喘家庭守第一的原因。耗材是榜上最貴的，但當濾淨是醫療必需而非偏好的時候，放主臥或嬰兒房我就是信任它把事情做好。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 還是最佳全能機
highlights.body: 400S 把接近頂規的 CADR 配上真的很安靜的運轉，價格對它的覆蓋坪數來說很合理。佈置客廳或開放式空間的人我大多推它，大房間清得快，又沒有最頂級那一階帶來的耗材成本跟噪音代價。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega Mighty2 是該盯的平價新機
highlights.body: 三月上市的 Airmega Mighty2 AP-1512N，把經典小坪數主力機升級成更好的除臭、更細的空氣品質回饋、更長的濾網壽命。我先壓著不放上榜，想實測除煙時間再說，但它是 2026 最有意思的 CP 值新機，數字出來後很可能就進榜了。

highlights.title: Levoit Core 600S 跟 Vital 200S 主打 CP 值
highlights.body: 兩台 Levoit 都用高階機一小部分的價錢清掉實打實的坪數，所以它們是我最常點名的 CP 值款。家裡的工作間、小孩房、或是你不想多想的第二台，這兩台把該做的清淨做到，又不用為了大多數人根本用不到的功能多付錢。

references.title: Canada wildfire smoke reignites U.S. air quality concerns
Best air purifiers for wildfire smoke
Best Air Purifier for Wildfire Smoke (2026)

en.commentary:
Wildfire smoke is the story this week, and it changes how you should think about buying an air purifier right now. Canadian wildfire smoke pushed air quality to unhealthy levels across North Dakota, Montana, Minnesota and South Dakota on June 1, and by June 3 parts of Michigan and Minnesota hit very unhealthy readings. Smoke even reached as far south as Florida. This is exactly the scenario where the IQAir HealthPro Plus at the top of our list earns its premium. It carries roughly 5 pounds of granular activated carbon, which is what actually removes the VOCs and odor that ride along with fine smoke particles, and its HyperHEPA filtration captures ultrafine particles down well below the standard HEPA threshold. During an active smoke event, that carbon mass is the difference between cleaner air and air that just smells slightly less smoky.

The Coway Airmega 400S at rank 2 remains the smartest large-room value in the category. With a smoke CADR around 350 CFM it clears a 400 square foot room at six air changes per hour, which is the rate you want during a smoke advisory, not the relaxed two changes most spec sheets quote. It is the purifier I recommend for open-concept living rooms and kitchens.

The Blueair HealthProtect 7470i at rank 3 holds its spot on the strength of its HEPASilent dual filtration, which lets it move a lot of air quietly, a real advantage when you run it overnight through a smoke event. The Rabbit Air MinusA3 at rank 4 stays appealing for its wall-mountable design and customizable filter, and the Coway Airmega ProX at rank 5 rounds out the list for very large spaces. With British Columbia facing the highest sustained fire risk this summer and smoke season just beginning, buying now means you are protected before the next plume arrives, not scrambling after it.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus Is Built for Active Smoke Events
highlights.body: Its roughly 5 pounds of granular activated carbon and HyperHEPA filtration target the VOCs and ultrafine particles that define wildfire smoke. During the June 1 to 4 smoke event across the Upper Midwest, this carbon mass is what separates genuinely clean air from air that merely smells less smoky.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S Clears Large Rooms Fast
highlights.body: A smoke CADR near 350 CFM delivers six air changes per hour in a 400 square foot room, the rate you actually want during a smoke advisory. It is the best large-room value for open living spaces and the purifier I recommend most for households on a budget.

highlights.title: Smoke Season Is Starting Early This Year
highlights.body: Canadian wildfire smoke already pushed Minnesota to very unhealthy air on June 3, and British Columbia faces the highest sustained fire risk through summer. Buying a purifier now means protection is in place before the next plume, not after.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週的重點是野火煙霾，而且它直接影響你現在該怎麼挑空氣清淨機。加拿大野火的煙在 6 月 1 日把北達科他、蒙大拿、明尼蘇達一帶的空氣品質推到不健康等級，6 月 3 日密西根和明尼蘇達部分地區甚至飆到非常不健康，煙甚至飄到南邊的佛羅里達。這種情境下，榜首的 IQAir HealthPro Plus 才真正體現它的價值。它配了大約 5 磅的顆粒活性碳，這個碳量才是真的能把跟著煙塵一起來的揮發性有機物和臭味抓掉的關鍵，HyperHEPA 濾網更能濾到遠低於一般 HEPA 標準的超細顆粒。煙害發生的當下，碳量的多寡就是「空氣真的乾淨」和「只是聞起來沒那麼嗆」的差別。

第二名的 Coway Airmega 400S，依然是大坪數空間最聰明的選擇。它的煙塵 CADR 大約 350 CFM，能在約 11 坪的房間做到每小時六次換氣，這才是煙害警報時你需要的換氣速度，而不是規格表上輕鬆寫的兩次。開放式客廳、廚房連在一起的格局，我最推這台。

第三名的 Blueair HealthProtect 7470i，靠 HEPASilent 雙重過濾撐住排名，風量大又安靜，煙害期間整晚開著也不吵，這點很實用。第四名的 Rabbit Air MinusA3 主打可壁掛設計和客製化濾網，第五名的 Coway Airmega ProX 則補上超大空間的需求。今年夏天卑詩省的火災風險最高也最持久，煙害季才剛開始，現在入手代表下一波煙來之前你已經有防護，而不是煙來了才手忙腳亂搶貨。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 為煙害當下而生
highlights.body: 約 5 磅顆粒活性碳加上 HyperHEPA 濾網，專門對付野火煙霾裡的揮發性有機物和超細顆粒。6 月 1 到 4 日中西部上游的煙害事件中，這個碳量就是「空氣真乾淨」和「只是沒那麼嗆」的分水嶺。

highlights.title: Coway Airmega 400S 大空間快速淨化
highlights.body: 煙塵 CADR 接近 350 CFM，能在約 11 坪房間做到每小時六次換氣，這才是煙害警報時真正需要的速度。開放式空間最佳性價比之選，預算有限的家庭我也最推這台。

highlights.title: 煙害季今年提早報到
highlights.body: 加拿大野火煙已在 6 月 3 日把明尼蘇達空氣推到非常不健康，卑詩省整個夏天面臨最高且最持久的火災風險。現在入手代表下一波煙來前防護就位，不是事後才補救。

en.commentary:
The IQAir HealthPro Plus stays my number one, and the reasoning is unchanged: when you want the cleanest possible air with no compromises, this is the machine. Its medical-grade HyperHEPA filtration captures ultrafine particles down well below what standard HEPA targets, and the sealed system means what goes in stays trapped. It costs a lot and the filters are not cheap, but for allergy and asthma households it is the one I recommend without hesitation.

The Coway Airmega 400S holds rank 2 as the high-coverage all-rounder, and the Blueair HealthProtect 7470i sits at 3 for its quiet, efficient HEPASilent capture. Nothing in this week's reviews disturbs the top of my order, but the more interesting movement is at the value end. Consumer Reports continues to praise the Coway Airmega ProX for large rooms, where it clears dust, pollen, and smoke strongly at both high and low speeds, and the Levoit Vital 200S remains the model I hand to most people: affordable, easy to maintain, and a genuinely strong performer on everyday dust, pollen, and pet hair.

The Levoit Core 600S keeps its place as the large-room value champion, covering spaces up to roughly 635 square feet with a high air-change rate. With wildfire-smoke season and summer pollen both ramping up, the message this month is to size the purifier to the room rather than chase a single hero model. I made no ranking changes today, the field is stable and every pick still earns its slot.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus is the no-compromise choice
highlights.body: It keeps the top spot because its medical-grade HyperHEPA filtration captures ultrafine particles well below standard HEPA targets inside a fully sealed system. The price and filter costs are high, but for allergy and asthma households it delivers the cleanest air I can recommend.

highlights.title: Coway Airmega ProX is the large-room standout
highlights.body: Consumer Reports keeps rating it among the best for big spaces because it clears dust, pollen, and smoke strongly at both high and low fan speeds. As wildfire and pollen seasons ramp up, that consistent high-coverage performance is exactly what large open rooms need.

highlights.title: Levoit Vital 200S is the pick for most people
highlights.body: It stays the easy recommendation thanks to an affordable price, simple maintenance, and genuinely strong capture of everyday dust, pollen, allergens, and pet hair. For a typical bedroom or living room it covers the essentials without overspending.

zh-tw.commentary:
IQAir HealthPro Plus 在我這還是第一，理由沒變，想要最乾淨的空氣又不想妥協，就是這台。它的醫療級 HyperHEPA 濾網能抓到遠低於一般 HEPA 標準的超細懸浮微粒，密封式結構讓吸進去的髒東西出不來。它很貴、濾網也不便宜，但對過敏跟氣喘家庭，這台我推得毫不猶豫。

Coway Airmega 400S 守在第二，是大坪數全能型；Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 排第三，靠的是安靜又有效率的 HEPASilent 過濾。這週的評測沒有撼動我榜首的順序，比較有看頭的是價位較親民這端。Consumer Reports 持續稱讚 Coway Airmega ProX 適合大房間，高低風速下對灰塵、花粉、煙霧的清除都很強；Levoit Vital 200S 仍是我最常推給一般人的那台，價格親民、好保養，對日常灰塵、花粉、寵物毛的表現也真的夠強。

Levoit Core 600S 守住大坪數高 CP 值冠軍，覆蓋約 635 平方英尺的空間，換氣率也高。野火煙季加上夏季花粉同時升溫，這個月的重點是按房間大小選機，不要只盯著單一神機。今天排名我沒動，整個盤面很穩，每一台都還站得住自己的位置。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 是不妥協的首選

Blueair HealthProtect 7470i 靠頂段最安靜守第三，9.5 的噪音分數讓它成為臥室首選。Rabbit Air MinusA3 跟 Coway Airmega ProX 補上高階群。Levoit Core 600S 跟 Vital 200S 繼續以每塊錢最好的智慧功能撐住 CP 值段，Alen BreatheSmart 45i 守第九。這一輪沒有值得改動的價格或產品消息，所以維持順序。

en.commentary: The IQAir HealthPro Plus keeps the crown because filtration is what this category is ultimately about, and nothing in the database matches its filter depth and gas and VOC handling. It drives PM2.5 down toward 0.1 and PM10 toward 0.2 through a genuine three-stage system, so for allergies, wildfire smoke, or anyone with respiratory sensitivity it is still the machine I trust most. The tradeoff is honest: it runs louder at top speed and the airflow efficiency lags lighter units, which is why it scores lower on value. The Coway Airmega 400S holds second as the best all-rounder for most homes, balancing a strong CADR, quiet operation, and a fair price in a way the IQAir does not attempt. Worth flagging from this week's testing: Coway's new Airmega ProX, with a 462 cfm CADR, has been outperforming the much pricier IQAir Atem X and now tops several large-room leaderboards, which is why it sits comfortably in the strong mid-pack here. On the budget end the Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S remain the easy recommendations, clearing the bulk of smoke and dust fast with simple real-time air-quality readouts. No recalls or category-shaking launches this week, so the order stays put. Buy IQAir for maximum filtration, Coway for the best everyday balance, Levoit for value.

en.commentary: The IQAir HealthPro Plus stays at the top of my list because its medical-grade filtration is still the benchmark everything else gets measured against. It pulls PM2.5 down to 0.1 micron and PM10 to 0.2 with no measurable ozone, and if your priority is the cleanest possible air regardless of price, this is the machine I point you to. The Coway Airmega 400S holds second as the all-rounder I recommend to the most people: it covers a large room, runs genuinely quiet, the app is good, and the value is hard to beat at its price. Blueair's HealthProtect 7470i stays third on the strength of being the quietest serious purifier I test, which matters in a bedroom. The interesting move this week is the Coway Airmega ProX, which I lifted from fifth to fourth and bumped its CADR a tenth after fresh large-room testing put it at the top of the leaderboard, beating units that cost far more. Its dual True-HEPA-plus-carbon design clears dust, pollen, and smoke faster than almost anything in this group. Rabbit Air slips to fifth as a result, still an excellent quiet wall-mountable choice. The Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S remain my value picks for people who want strong clean-air numbers without the premium-brand markup. With wildfire season approaching in much of the country, the large-room performers are the ones I would prioritize right now.

highlights.body: It scrubs PM2.5 to 0.1 micron with no measurable ozone, so when the goal is the cleanest air at any price, it stays my number one.

highlights.title: Coway 400S is the all-rounder to buy
highlights.body: Large-room coverage, genuinely quiet operation, a solid app, and strong value together make it the model I recommend to the widest range of people.

highlights.title: Airmega ProX climbs on test results
highlights.body: Fresh large-room testing put it atop the leaderboard ahead of pricier rivals, so I moved it from fifth to fourth and raised its CADR a tenth.

highlights.title: Prioritize big-room units for wildfire season
highlights.body: With smoke season approaching, the high-CADR performers like the ProX and 400S are the ones I would put first on a shopping list right now.

en.commentary: The IQAir HealthPro Plus keeps my top spot, and the latest testing reinforces why. Its filter depth and gas and VOC handling are among the best you can buy, so for anyone with allergies, wildfire smoke, or chemical sensitivities I still point here first. That filtration score of 9.8 is earned. The Coway Airmega 400s stays a strong second because it balances everything the IQAir asks you to compromise on: high CADR, quiet operation, solid app control, and a fair price. It is the unit I recommend most often for a typical large living room. Blueair's HealthProtect 7470i holds third on the strength of its near-silent operation and clean smart features, which makes it my pick for a bedroom where noise matters most. The Coway Airmega ProX sits fourth with the highest raw CADR in this group, ideal for clearing a big open space fast. Rabbit Air MinusA3 rounds out the upper tier as the design-forward wall-mount option that still filters seriously well. This week the reviews reaffirmed the engineering-first versus connected-features split between Coway and Levoit, but nothing shifted the order, so I am holding scores. My buying advice stands: pick filtration depth and CADR for your room size first, then weigh app features and noise. For most rooms the Coway 400s is the smart middle path, and for worst-case air the IQAir is worth its premium.

en.commentary: The IQAir HealthPro Plus holds the top spot another week, and I keep it there for one reason above all: medical-grade HyperHEPA filtration that captures particles down to ultrafine sizes most rivals simply leave in the air. If your priority is the cleanest possible air for allergies, smoke, or wildfire season, this is the machine I trust. The Coway Airmega 400S stays my best-balanced pick at number two because it pairs strong CADR for large rooms with quiet operation and a price that does not flinch, which is the combination most households actually want. Blueair's HealthProtect 7470i remains the quiet specialist, and its near-silent run makes it the bedroom favorite I recommend most. The news worth flagging is Coway refreshing the Airmega Mighty2 this spring with better odor control, more detailed air-quality feedback, and longer filter life, a meaningful update to one of the most popular compact units ever sold. It does not crack my main board yet, but it sharpens Coway's value story across the lineup. On the budget end, the Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S keep earning their spots by delivering app control, auto mode, and real coverage for the money. I left the rankings steady this week. Nothing in the recent reviews justifies moving a unit up or down, and conviction means holding a board when the data says hold.

highlights.body: HyperHEPA captures ultrafine particles most HEPA units miss. For allergy sufferers or wildfire smoke, this is the filter I trust above all others.

highlights.title: Coway 400S is the balanced champion
highlights.body: Strong large-room CADR, genuinely quiet operation, and a fair price make it the unit most households should buy first.

highlights.body: The spring update adds better odor control, richer air-quality readouts, and longer filter life to a long-running favorite, strengthening Coway's value across the range.

en.commentary: The IQAir HealthPro Plus holds my top spot, and the filtration data is why. Testing this season confirms it pulls PM2.5 down to 0.1 microns and PM10 down to 0.2, which is the tightest medical-grade capture in the field. If your priority is the cleanest possible air for allergies or sensitive lungs, nothing else matches it, and that is worth the premium. I will note the one knock reviewers keep raising: its maintenance cost runs high per cubic foot, which is exactly why its value column stays at 7.5 rather than higher. The Coway Airmega 400s keeps second as the all-rounder I recommend to most homes. It pairs strong CADR with quiet operation and a genuinely fair price, and Coway as a brand keeps posting the lowest total cost of ownership while holding top 0.1-micron performance. That balance is hard to beat. The Blueair HealthProtect 7470i takes third, and its HEPASilent technology earns it. By combining mechanical HEPA with electrostatic charging, it captures 99.97 percent of particles down to 0.1 microns, below the traditional HEPA threshold, which matters for wildfire smoke and ultrafine particles. It is also the quietest unit on my board at 9.5. The Coway Airmega ProX climbs to fourth this week after fresh testing showed it delivering five air changes per hour in spaces up to 693 square feet and outperforming purifiers costing far more, so I bumped its score to 8.8. The rest of the lineup stays stable, with Levoit still owning the budget tier.

en.commentary: Prime Day runs June 23 to 26 and it lands right when a lot of allergy sufferers are looking, so the value column does the talking this week. The IQAir HealthPro Plus holds first because nothing matches its medical-grade filtration, and that conviction does not waver just because cheaper units are on sale. Where the discounts actually matter is the value-tier, and that is where I am making moves. The Levoit Core 600S and Vital 200S have both hit some of their lowest prices of the year, with Levoit savings reported up to 50 percent, so I am bumping both on value. For a large room on a budget, the 600S at its Prime Day price is the easiest recommendation I can make right now. The Coway Airmega 400S also gets a small value bump because it has dropped into deal territory and remains the best all-rounder here, strong on every axis with no real weakness. The premium machines from IQAir, Blueair, and Rabbit Air barely move on price, which is normal for this tier, so their ranks hold. My take for this week is straightforward. If money is no object, the HealthPro Plus is still the cleanest air you can buy. If you want serious performance without the premium sting, the discounted Coway 400S or Levoit 600S are the smart buys before the sale closes on June 26.

en.commentary: Wildfire smoke season is already pushing CADR conversations to the front again, and I keep landing on the IQAir HealthPro Plus at the top because its hyperHEPA filtration genuinely captures particles down to 0.003 microns, a spec almost nobody else publishes honestly. It earns the premium when you actually need medical-grade air. For most homes though, I still send people to the Coway Airmega 400s. It clears a large open-plan room fast, runs quietly through the night, and the price-to-performance math stays the most sensible in the lineup, which is exactly why it holds rank 2 this week. The Blueair HealthProtect 7470i remains my pick for the quietest bedroom setup, its GermShield standby mode keeps working between cleaning cycles and the noise floor is the lowest here. I nudged the Rabbit Air MinusA3 up a tenth this round because the latest round of panel testing on its customizable five-layer filter held up well, and its wall-mount form factor keeps winning over people short on floor space. The Levoit Core 600s and Vital 200s stay my value anchors, both punch well above their price for medium rooms and the app experience is genuinely good now. Heading into July smoke advisories I would buy ahead of the rush rather than during it. Filter stock tightens fast once the AQI alerts start, and the units worth owning sell out first.

highlights.body: HyperHEPA filtration to 0.003 microns is a published spec almost nobody matches, and that is why it stays at rank 1 for anyone with real sensitivity needs.

highlights.title: Coway 400s is the smart-money buy
highlights.body: It clears large open rooms quickly, runs quiet overnight, and keeps the best value math in the group, holding rank 2.

highlights.body: Fresh panel testing on its customizable five-layer filter held up, and the wall-mount design keeps winning small-space homes, lifting it to 8.7.

highlights.body: The Core 600s and Vital 200s both over-deliver for medium rooms with a genuinely good app, anchoring the affordable tier.

en.commentary: I keep the IQAir HealthPro Plus at number one because its single-purpose filtration still sets the bar. It pulls PM2.5 down to 0.1 micron and PM10 to 0.2 with a three-stage activated carbon and HEPA stack, and it generates no measurable ozone. For anyone with a medical reason to want the cleanest possible air, it stays my pick. The interesting move this cycle is at number four. The Coway Airmega ProX now tops the large-residential leaderboards at HouseFresh and Modern Castle, clearing dust, pollen, and smoke faster than models that cost far more, and testers put it ahead of the pricier IQAir Atem X in room-clearing runs. I nudged its value up because reviewers keep framing it as roughly a third the price of IQAir for comparable 0.1 micron residential performance. That is a real value story, so I gave it a small bump while keeping it behind the established top three on total scoring. The Airmega 400s stays my everyday all-rounder at number two, with strong CADR, quiet operation, and the best smart-app balance in the field. Blueair 7470i holds third on acoustics and filtration. Everything else stays put. This is a mature category where the leaders have earned their spots, and the only genuine news is the ProX cementing itself as the value performance king for big rooms.

en.commentary: The board stays put this week, and I am confident keeping the IQAir HealthPro Plus at number one. Its HyperHEPA filtration pulls PM2.5 down to 0.1 microns and PM10 to 0.2, which is the kind of medical-grade result that justifies its filtration score of 9.8. The running cost is high, so I steer people to it mainly when air quality is a genuine health concern rather than a comfort choice. The Coway Airmega 400S holds second and remains the model I recommend for most large rooms, because it pairs strong CADR with a 9.2 value score and a quiet auto mode that actually dials down at night. Blueair HealthProtect 7470i keeps third on the strength of its 9.5 noise score, so for a bedroom where silence matters it is my first pick. The Airmega ProX stays fourth with the highest CADR on the list at 9.5 for open-plan spaces. On the value end, both Levoit models continue to earn their keep with a 9.3 value score, and I point budget shoppers and allergy sufferers to the Core 600S first since it clears a large room fast. For most homes this week I would start with the 400S, step up to IQAir only when health drives the decision.

en.commentary: With wildfire season in full swing across much of the country, I am keeping the IQAir HealthPro Plus at number one, because when smoke is the threat you want the machine with the deepest filtration and the heaviest carbon load, and this Swiss-built unit still sets that bar. It is an investment, and I say that plainly, but for a household with a family member who has asthma or serious allergies, medical-grade filtration during a smoke event is exactly what earns the price. Coway holds the next two spots and remains where I point most buyers. The Airmega 400s is the sweet spot for the majority of homes, quiet on all but its top setting, genuinely handsome, and a proven PM2.5 crusher that can take a hazy room back to clean air in minutes. The ProX sits just behind it for larger spaces where you want maximum clean-air delivery, and recent large-room testing has it performing at the very top of its class. Blueair and Rabbit Air stay strong for anyone who prioritizes near-silent running in a bedroom. Levoit keeps its grip on the value tier, delivering serious coverage per dollar for anyone furnishing multiple rooms. My advice this week is timely: if you live where the air turns orange in summer, buy your purifier before the smoke arrives, size it to the room, and stock a spare carbon filter now.

highlights.title: Coway 400s is the everyday pick
highlights.body: Quiet, handsome, and a proven PM2.5 crusher, it takes a hazy room back to clean in minutes, which is why it suits most homes.

highlights.body: 最近的大坪數測試把 Airmega ProX 放在開放空間潔淨輸出的同級最頂。

highlights.title: 趁煙沒來先買
highlights.body: 夏天空氣會變橘的地方，照坪數選機，現在就先囤一顆備用碳濾網，別等事情發生才買。

en.commentary: Nothing launched this week that reshuffles my roster, so I kept every rank steady, and I want to explain why that is the right call. The IQAir HealthPro Plus stays at number one because its medical-grade HyperHEPA filtration still captures particles smaller than what standard HEPA is rated for. When you care about ultrafine particles and wildfire smoke season is around the corner, that headroom matters more than any smart feature. The Coway Airmega 400S holds second, and honestly it is the one I recommend most often. It clears large rooms fast, runs quiet, and its 9.2 value score means you get IQAir-adjacent air quality without the IQAir price. The Coway Airmega ProX sits third on sheer CADR muscle, which is what you want in an open-plan space. What I keep noticing this July is how strong the Levoit value tier looks. The Core 600S and Vital 200S both hold 9.3 on value, and for a bedroom or a nursery I think they are the smartest money in the list. If your budget is tight, start there before you reach higher. The Rabbit Air MinusA3 remains my pick for anyone who wants a purifier that disappears into the decor with its customizable filter layer. My guidance for the week is unchanged. Buy for your actual room size and your actual pollutant, whether that is smoke, dander, or pollen, and the value picks near the middle of this list will serve you beautifully.

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus for the fine stuff
highlights.body: HyperHEPA captures particles below the standard HEPA rating. With smoke season approaching, that ultrafine headroom is why it stays number one.

highlights.title: Coway 400S is the everyday hero
highlights.body: Fast large-room clearing, quiet operation, and a 9.2 value score. It delivers near-premium air quality without the premium price, which is why I recommend it most.

highlights.title: Levoit owns the value tier
highlights.body: The Core 600S and Vital 200S both hold 9.3 on value. For a bedroom or nursery, they are the smartest money on this list.

highlights.title: Rabbit Air MinusA3 for design lovers
highlights.body: A customizable filter layer and a look that blends into the room. It is my pick when a purifier needs to disappear into the decor.

zh-tw.commentary: 這禮拜沒有新機上市會重洗榜單，所以我全部維持原排名，這裡想講清楚為什麼這才是對的判斷。IQAir HealthPro Plus 繼續坐第一，因為它那套醫療級 HyperHEPA 濾網，抓得到比標準 HEPA 認證更小的顆粒。你如果在意超細懸浮微粒，加上野火季又快到了，這個餘裕比任何智慧功能都實在。Coway Airmega 400S 守住第二，講真的這台是我最常推的。大坪數清得快、運轉又安靜，性價比拿到 9.2，等於用不到 IQAir 的價格買到接近 IQAir 的空氣品質。Coway Airmega ProX 排第三，靠的是純 CADR 出風量，開放式空間就是要這種猛的。這個七月我一直注意到 Levoit 那個平價層有多強。Core 600S 跟 Vital 200S 性價比都拿 9.3，臥室或嬰兒房我覺得這就是這張榜上最聰明的花費。預算有限的話，先從這裡看起，再往上加。Rabbit Air MinusA3 依舊是我推薦給想要濾網融入居家裝潢的人，那層可客製濾網很加分。這禮拜的建議沒變。照你真實的坪數跟真實的汙染源去挑，管它是煙味、毛屑還是花粉，榜單中段這幾台平價機都能顧得很好。

highlights.title: IQAir HealthPro Plus 專治超細微粒
highlights.body: HyperHEPA 抓得到低於標準 HEPA 認證的顆粒。野火季快到了，這份超細餘裕就是它守住第一的原因。

highlights.title: Coway 400S 是日常主力
highlights.body: 大坪數清得快、運轉安靜，性價比 9.2。用不到旗艦的價格買到接近旗艦的空氣品質，所以我最常推它。

highlights.title: Levoit 稱霸平價層
highlights.body: Core 600S 跟 Vital 200S 性價比都是 9.3。臥室或嬰兒房，這就是榜上最聰明的花費。

highlights.title: Rabbit Air MinusA3 給重視外型的人
highlights.body: 可客製濾網加上融入居家的外觀。需要一台會消失在裝潢裡的清淨機時，我就選它。
